model_description: Small decoder-only Transformer trained on synthetic (a, b, p) -> (a*b mod p) sequences. Digit-level tokenisation, base-10 output.
training_description: Trained from random init on ~10^6 synthetic (a, b, p, a*b mod p) examples generated by the test-gen distribution at Tier 1-2 scale; digit-level tokenisation, AdamW, ~15k steps.
